creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks! 

About the pkg-message, when I first ported this, I needed to add myself to 
games group otherwise I was not able to load saved game. But I could save a 
game just fine! Perhaps they fixed the bug in the game and this is no longer 
necessary, I will have to check.
